scripts.build:chrome: rimraf dist/chrome && tsc --outDir dist/chrome && node scripts/prepare-dist.mjs chrome dist/chrome
scripts.build:firefox: rimraf dist/firefox && tsc --outDir dist/firefox && node scripts/prepare-dist.mjs firefox dist/firefox
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.lint:firefox: npm run build:firefox && NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER=1 web-ext lint --source-dir dist/firefox
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER=1 web-ext build --source-dir dist/chrome --artifacts-dir packages --filename youtube-clean-url-chrome-v{version}.zip --overwrite-dest
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER=1 web-ext build --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir packages --filename youtube-clean-url-firefox-v{version}.zip --overwrite-dest
scripts.package: npm run clean:packages && npm run package:chrome && npm run package:firefox
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run lint:firefox
